name: Light Pill #15 - The River Singer
description: The River Singer - A glowing capsule that reveals the songs of flowing waters and teaches the language of currents and change. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Flowing blue-green silks that move like water currents
Conch shell that sings with the voice of ancient oceans
Bare feet that walk on water surfaces
Underground river cavern with bioluminescent waterfalls
Rivers remember every story that has ever flowed through them, and they sing them to those who listen.
You must learn and sing three water songs - one for what was, one for what is, and one for what will be. The river will answer each verse with its own melody, revealing secrets in the harmony.
Must be taken near flowing water

properties.ai_prompt: Ethereal fashion editorial of The River Singer in an underground river cavern with bioluminescent waterfalls, wearing flowing blue-green silks that move like water currents, holding a conch shell to their ear. Aqua Flow aura with Continuous Current energy, bare feet walking on the water's surface, cinematic lighting that captures the dance of light on moving water, 8K, hyperdetailed with visible current patterns and glowing aquatic life.
